verses.text: Eite a hong Hon Pasian leh eite' lamet Khrih Jesuh' thupiakna tawh Khrih Jesuh' sawltak ahi keimah Paul in
Thu upna sungah ka tapa taktak ahi Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. * Pa Pasian leh eite' Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna, hehpihna leh nopsakna thupha, nangma tungah hong tungsak ta hen.

Masedonia gam lam manawhin ka pai lai-in Efesa khua-ah na om ding ka hong sawl mah bangin tu-in zong tua khua mahah na omlai in la, thu upna manlo a hilh mite, a thuhilh a khawlna dingun thu na pia in

Phuahtawm tangthute leh min tampipi kizom deudau-a khangsimnate in upna tawh i ngahtheih Pasian' vaihawmnate tangtungsak loin, khatlekhat kitotna piangsak lel ahih manin, tua bang thute a manlahpih lohna dingun na gen in
Hih bangin thupiakna pen, upna taktak leh kisuan'na om hetloin lungsim siangtho taktak tawh ngaihsutna panin a hong piangkhia ki-itna a khan'theihna ding deihna ahi hi
Mi pawlkhatte, hihbang ngaihsutna panin peukhia-in bangmahin a kimanglo thu kikupna tawh nitum uh hi
Thei kisa ngelin a gen kankan uh thute leh amau kampauna mahmah zong bang gen ka hi hiam cih a thei hetlo hinapi-in amaute pen Pasian' thukhamte a hilh dingin utzaw lai uh hi
Thukham pen a kizatna ding a kilawm ciangah zangthei lehang a hoih thu khat hi, ci-in i thei hi

Ahi zongin i phawk dingah, mi hoihte-a' dingin thukham a kibawl hilo a, thukham zuilote, thumang lote, Pasian' deih bangin a gamta lote leh mawhneite, biakna lungsim a neilote leh kam kilawmlo a paute, nute pate a thatte, midang a thatte
nulepa mawhna a gamtate, palepa mawhna a bawlte, mi a gute, zuauthu a gente, mite' siatna ding thu a gente, leh thuman tawh a kilehbulhin a gamta mite-a' dingin thukham a kibawl ahi hi
Thuman ka cih pen thupha tawh kidimin a minthang Pasian in ka hilh dingin kei tungah a hong piak Lungdamna Thu ahi hi.
Hihbangin na sepzawhna dingin thatang hatna a hong pia i Topa Khrih Jesuh tungah ka lungdam hi. Ama nasem dingin kei hong muangin hong seh ahih manin ka nuam hi
A beisa hunah amah gensia-in, simmawh bawlin, ama mite a bawlsiapa ka hih ngei tei hangin ama thu ka up nailoh manin theihlohna tawh a gamta ka hih manin Pasian in kei hong hehpih hi
Pasian in genzawh lohin kei hong hehpih a, Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlna hangin i ngahtheih upna leh itna a hong guan' hi
Khrih Jesuh, mawhneite a honkhia dingin leitungah hong pai hi, cihna thu a man hi a, a uphuai a san'huai thu ahi hi. Keimah zong tua mawhnei mite lakah a mawhpha bel ka hi hi

A mawhneipha bel ka hihna thu hang mahin, nidang ciangin amah umin nuntak tawntungna a ngahding mite' etteh theihdingin Khrih Jesuh in a lungduaina cingtakin kei tungah hong lahtheihna dingin Pasian in kei a hong hehpih ahi hi
Amah bek Pasian ahi, a kimu theilo, a si ngeilo, tawntung Kumpipa in minthan'na leh pahtawina ngah tawntung ta hen. Amen
Ka ta Timoti aw, tanglai peka kipanin nang bang mite-a' dingin a kigensa thu tawh kizui-in nang tungah a thu ka hong ap hi. Hoihtakin gal na dozawhna dingin galhiamin tua thute zang in la
na upna leh lungsim kisuang loin na omna thu kiptakin len paisuak in. Mi pawlkhatte in a lungsim kitheihna uhah man a kisakna bangun gamtalo uh ahih manin a thu upna uh a mawkna a suah uh hi
Tua bang mite lakah Hymenaias leh Alexander kihel uh a, Pasian gensiat nawnlohna ding thu a phawktheihna dingun Satan' khutsungah amaute ka ap hi.
